dialogue: Oh no, I can't find the way... This cursed tower is a maze.
If only someone was here to help me, like my friend from last time...
AH! IT'S YOU!
I just said your name, and you appeared!
I got lost again...
But I believe in you! Now, not only can we find the way out, but we can get the treasure too!
See ? With you at my side, we'll get to the treasure in no time!
Alright, the next few puzzles don't look easy.
But for you it will be nothing!
Wow, you're so good at this!
Well well well, more puzzles... you've got this!
You make it look so easy...
We're making a lot of progress!
Ha ha! More puzzles... but nothing can stop you!
This looked more difficult than before, and yet you make it look so easy!
We're getting close to the end, I can feel it
Only a few puzzles before the treasure.
For you it'll be a piece of cake to solve!
I was ready to stop looking for the treasure, but thanks to you we got to the top of the tower!
The treasure is very close, I know it!
But of course, the last few puzzles are the most difficult.
Not for you though, you can do it!
We finally made it out!
You're really good at these puzzles. I've never seen someone solve so many hard ones before!
And now... time for the treasure.
A giant pizza!
Thanks to you, we got to the end of the tower and got a reward!
My friend, I will call you every time I go treasure hunting, I promise you!
